purpose: Stable job ID for capture queue and log linkage
validation_rule: Must be unique across the queue/log.
Every S- ID must already exist in sources.tsv or queue status is needs_source_row.

purpose: Links screenshot/page render to visual asset slots
validation_rule: If non-none, every A- ID should exist in assets_manifest.tsv or be planned in a manifest draft.

purpose: Controls capture method and required metadata
validation_rule: Must map to a workflow in data/source_download_automation_plan_i0183.tsv.
URLs must include scheme; local paths must be relative to workspace unless explicitly external.

allowed_values_or_format: ISO timestamp with timezone or YYYY-MM-DD
validation_rule: Must not be blank; if post-cutoff, cutoff_status must explain why the artifact is valid.

purpose: Expected output or capture note path
validation_rule: Heavy extensions under assets/ are allowed only as ignored private-use paths.
At least one hash required except queue-only planned rows.
Use 0 for screenshot-only/no-quote capture; default 25 otherwise.

purpose: Prevents capture from becoming overbroad evidence
validation_rule: Allowed use cannot include chart/data unless normalization fields are planned.
Post-cutoff captures need artifact date or caveat.
Must say capture, normalize, rights_review, manifest_sync, reject, or supersede.
